title: Implement per-player state storage via NeoForge AttachmentType with .sync() configuration

reference_files.reason: Three-tier ownership - per-player storage carrier (NeoForge AttachmentType, player NBT)
Persistence table - per-player via AttachmentType NBT, sync via .sync() IAttachmentSerializer requirement

acceptance_criteria: PlayerStateData class/record holds Map<ResourceLocation, Object> for per-player state values
AttachmentType<PlayerStateData> registered via DeferredRegister with .sync() configured using IAttachmentSerializer
AttachmentType persists to player NBT (survives relogin)
AttachmentType syncs to client via .sync() configuration (client receives per-player state updates)
PlayerStateData Codec uses StateValueCodecs dispatch for mixed value type serialization
PlayerStateData defaults to empty map when no states written
PlayerStateData.setState(id, value)/getState(id)/clearState(id) helper methods maintain immutability
AttachmentType registered on mod event bus in ModularShoot constructor
